name: Ajinextek Co., Ltd.
summary: Ajinextek Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells motor control VLSI chips in South Korea. It offers motion chips, including one axis and four axes motion control chips; module boards, which include motion, counter, digital, and analog modules; single boards comprising motion and digital boards; and network controller products, including motion control products that support industrial distributed networks. The company also offers ARM based small stand-alone motion controllers; general-purpose robot controllers; and accessories, including solutions for noise protection, and shielded cable and advanced terminal block for external device or sensor signal wiring. Ajinextek Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Daegu, South Korea.
